title: woodsia ilvensis
intro: Woodsia ilvensis, also known as the alpine woodsia or alpine cliff fern, is a species of fern found in mountainous regions of North America, Asia, and Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The medicinal properties of Woodsia ilvensis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues, including arthritis and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
